_comment: Measurable rubric for FDE Assignment 1. `auto` items are scored by eval.py; `manual` items are scored by a human/grader using the captured evidence + the video demo. Total = 100.

criteria.label: Widget lights up (contract works end to end)
criteria.check: translate + batch return valid shapes through the gateway

criteria.label: Caching correctness (two-tier, provable, persistent)
criteria.check: 2nd identical request cached=true with lower latency; SQLite db exists with rows

criteria.label: Logging & observability
criteria.check: /stats returns a hit rate; /health reports the AI service; ai-service.log has structured lines; a request id (X-Request-Id) correlates one request across the gateway and AI-service logs

criteria.label: Service separation & correct status codes
criteria.check: 400 on bad input; gateway health nests AI-service health

criteria.label: LLM & prompt quality (natural Mexican Spanish)
criteria.check: grader judges the captured sample translations + video: es-MX register, translation only, numbers/prices/codes preserved

criteria.label: Deploy & docs
criteria.check: both services deployed on Fly.io with the public gateway /health reachable (pass --deploy-url to capture it); one-command local run; clear README run notes; clean git hygiene (auto-flagged below)
